
## What a typical QE Workflow is like {.scrollable}

QE is not one code but a suite of codes. 

<!-- ![](figs/quantum_espresso_workflow.svg){width=1200px} -->

<!-- <img src="figs/quantum_espresso_workflow.svg" width="600px"> -->
![](figs/quantum_espresso_workflow.png){width=1200}

An understanding of each aspect is crucial.

## What is working with ASE like
